'''tayuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jobation|jobation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-y-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jobation|jobation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tayuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæyiwith|tæyiwith]] || [[word:tæyiwij|tæyiwij]] || [[word:tæyiwish|tæyiwish]] || [[word:tæyiwi|tæyiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tayuyuwuth|tayuyuwuth]] || [[word:tayuyuwuj|tayuyuwuj]] || [[word:tayuyuwush|tayuyuwush]] || [[word:tayuyuwu|tayuyuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tayuwuth|tayuwuth]] || [[word:tayuwuj|tayuwuj]] || [[word:tayuwush|tayuwush]] || [[word:tayuwu|tayuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tayufwufth|tayufwufth]] || [[word:tayufwufj|tayufwufj]] || [[word:tayufwufsh|tayufwufsh]] || [[word:tayufwuf|tayufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tayuwuthu|tayuwuthu]] || [[word:tayuwuju|tayuwuju]] || [[word:tayuwushu|tayuwushu]] || [[word:tayuwuku|tayuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tayuwuth|tayuwuth]] || [[word:tayuwuj|tayuwuj]] || [[word:tayuwush|tayuwush]] || [[word:tayuwu|tayuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tayuwuthul|tayuwuthul]] || [[word:tayuwujul|tayuwujul]] || [[word:tayuwushul|tayuwushul]] || [[word:tayuwukul|tayuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tayuwuuthuthu|tayuwuuthuthu]] || [[word:tayuwuujuju|tayuwuujuju]] || [[word:tayuwuushushu|tayuwuushushu]] || [[word:tayuwuuku|tayuwuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tayuwuthun|tayuwuthun]] || [[word:tayuwujun|tayuwujun]] || [[word:tayuwushun|tayuwushun]] || [[word:tayuwukun|tayuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tayuwuthuoro|tayuwuthuoro]] || [[word:tayuwujuoro|tayuwujuoro]] || [[word:tayuwushuoro|tayuwushuoro]] || [[word:tayuwukuoro|tayuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5551a29}}
